title: [MTR4] SCR Airlink Class 802
body:
Ever wanted some more Airlink trains in your Minecraft world? You're lucky!

This pack adds the 802 Airlink Livery from SCR with accurate sounds!

### **Disclaimer**
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Hitachi Rail, Stepford County Railway, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315
